briefdescription.para: Human-readable application/firmware name.
Human-readable application/firmware version.
millis() value captured when the global CAppl object is created.
Application-local variable table, exported as "cfg".
Application message bus used by modules and log writers.
Event-based application logger.
Register a module with configuration, status and event handling.

parameterdescription.para: Name used for config/status sections and event logging.

briefdescription.para: Write application and registered-module configuration.
Read application and registered-module settings from JSON.
Read a configuration file and load settings into all modules.

parameterdescription.para: Config file path, or nullptr for JSON_APPL_CONFIG_FILE.
Legacy JSON document size for older ArduinoJson versions.

simplesect.para: true if a configuration file was loaded successfully.

briefdescription.para: Migrate legacy configuration keys into their current locations.

parameterdescription.para: Root configuration node to migrate in place.

briefdescription.para: Persist the current configuration to the file system.

parameterdescription.para: Legacy JSON document size for older ArduinoJson versions.

simplesect.para: true if the configuration was written successfully.

briefdescription.para: Build and return the reusable application status node.

simplesect.para: Pointer owned by CAppl; do not delete it.

briefdescription.para: Return the current application status serialized as JSON text.
Return the compact state view of this device.
Return the compact device state serialized as JSON text.
Write application metadata and module status into a JSON node.
Write lower-level system diagnostics into a JSON node.
Return the native system time.
Return application uptime as HH:MM:SS.
Return current local date/time as YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.
Return current local date as YYYY-MM-DD.
Return current local time as HH:MM:SS.
Return the stable chip/device identifier from system status.
Return the configured device name.
Set the configured device name from a C string.
Set the configured device name from a String.
Set the configured device password from a C string.
Set the configured device password from a String.
Return the configured device password.
Create the global application hub.
Dispatch a periodic loop message to all registered receivers.

memberdef.argsstring: (const void *pSender, int nMsgType, const void *pMessage, int nClass)
memberdef.name: receiveEvent

briefdescription.para: Handle application-level events such as reboot requests.
Initialize the application metadata and announce startup.
Publish the application-started event after initialization finished.
Print a short application banner to Serial.
Print flash/heap diagnostics and verify flash size configuration.
Send shutdown events and restart the ESP after the given delay.
Central application hub for modules, configuration, status and events.

detaileddescription.para: CAppl owns the message bus, central logger, variable table and reusable status documents. Modules register here to participate in config loading/saving, status reporting and application lifecycle events.
